subject: Fix: Manually create initial repository files
commit_message:
Fix: Manually create initial repository files

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33

Seems the automated setup jobs failed to create the required gerrit
configuration files. This change manually creates them.

Change-Id: Ic75a7c7b24fe3c03478977ad70ca4fad5637627f
Signed-off-by: Matthew Watkins <mwatkins@linuxfoundation.org>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-opa-pdp-info-yaml-verify/1/ : FAILURE

No problems were identified. If you know why this problem occurred, please add a suitable Cause for it. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-opa-pdp-info-yaml-verify/1/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/policy-opa-pdp-info-yaml-verify/1

Uploaded patch set 2.

Outdated Votes:
* Verified-1 (copy condition: "changekind:NO_CHANGE")

Patch Set 2: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-opa-pdp-info-yaml-verify/2/ : FAILURE

No problems were identified. If you know why this problem occurred, please add a suitable Cause for it. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-opa-pdp-info-yaml-verify/2/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/policy-opa-pdp-info-yaml-verify/2

Change has been successfully merged

1 is the latest approved patch-set.
The change was submitted with unreviewed changes in the following files:
